hooks.command: echo "[PreToolUse] Bash about to run. Input: $(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command','?')[:80])" 2>/dev/null || echo '?')" >> /tmp/claude-hooks.log
echo "[PostToolUse] File written: $(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path','?'))" 2>/dev/null || echo '?')" >> /tmp/claude-hooks.log
